description: A Japanese woodblock print depicting a woman with long, flowing black hair nursing a robust, red-skinned child. The woman has pale white skin and delicate features, looking down tenderly at the child. The child, Kintaro, has a ruddy complexion and dark hair and is shown nursing at her breast. The background is plain, and Japanese characters appear in the upper left. The style is refined and elegant, typical of ukiyo-e portraiture. The color palette is restrained with blacks, skin tones, and subtle fabric patterns.

_meta.title: Yama uba and Kintaro with a Wine Cup
